channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Israeli strike on hospital tent camp kills 4 and ignites a fire that burns dozens
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — An Israeli airstrike on a hospital courtyard in the Gaza Strip early Monday killed at least four people and sent flames sweeping through a packed tent camp for people displaced by the war, leaving more than two dozen with severe burns, according to Palestinian medics
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Things to know about AP's report on the federal criminal cases against former President Donald Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A year that began with the prospect of a federal court reckoning for Donald Trump will conclude without any chance at trial, leaving voters without the finality of an up-or-down jury verdict in the two most consequential cases against the Republican presidential nominee.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lions pass rusher Aidan Hutchinson needs surgery after injury to left tibia vs. Cowboys
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Detroit Lions defensive end Aidan Hutchinson was carted off the field with a serious injury to his left tibia on a sack of Dallas' Dak Prescott. Hutchinson was staying in the Dallas area for surgery, Lions coach Dan Campbell said after Sunday's 47-9 win over the Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Man arrested outside Trump Coachella rally denies assassination intent; he's 'all in' supporting Trump
item.description: The suspect who was arrested after authorities apprehended him on his way into the Coachella rally for former President Donald Trump is setting the record straight and working to clear his name.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida neighbors band together to recover after one-two punch from hurricanes Helene and Milton
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — When ankle-deep floodwaters from Hurricane Helene bubbled up through the floors of their home, Kat Robinson-Malone and her husband sent a late-night text message to their neighbors two doors down: “Hey, we're coming.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and LAURA BARGFELD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Group associated with polygamous sect builds fences on US Forest Service lands
item.description: A group in Montezuma County has fenced a parcel of U.S. Forest Service Land in an attempt to claim the land under the Homestead Act of 1862.
item.dc:creator: Heather Willard, NewsNation

item.title: Fisherman finds stolen car in Red River in Louisiana
item.description: According to deputies, this is not the first vehicle recovered at the Grand Ecor Bluff along the Red River.
item.dc:creator: Jaclyn Tripp, NewsNation

item.title: Deputies 'probably' prevented 3rd Trump assassination attempt, California sheriff says
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Man with 'sword' prompts hours-long standoff in Wisconsin
item.description: After several hours, a K9 Unit was sent in, leading to the suspect being taken into custody on several charges.
item.dc:creator: Ben Newhouse, NewsNation

item.title: Trump calls for protester to 'go back home to Mommy' during California rally
item.description: Trump called for the protester to “get the hell knocked out of her,” his latest instance of using violent language when confronted by demonstrators.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What we know about arrest outside Trump’s California rally
item.description: Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco, a noted supporter of Trump, discussed safety measures taken at the Saturday event.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: From the pulpit, Harris calls out Trump for hurricane misinformation. Biden surveys Florida's damage
item.description: GREENVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Kamala Harris used an appearance Sunday before a largely Black church audience in battleground North Carolina to call out Donald Trump for spreading misinformation about the government's hurricane response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, AAMER MADHANI and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Sam's Club opening location in Texas, but there's no checkout lanes
item.description: Sam's Club CEO Chris Nicholas says the warehouse club chain will soon open a store in Texas but there won't be any checkout lanes.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, NewsNation

item.title: Democratic voter registration raises red flags for Harris
item.description: Democrats’ voter registration advantage has dropped in three key battleground states — Pennsylvania, North Carolina and Nevada — raising a red flag for Vice President Harris as experts cite a lack of enthusiasm for the Biden administration brand and the Democratic Party, generally, as problems.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Riverside Co. Sheriff says deputies 'probably' prevented third assassination attempt on Trump
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities. The arrest took place at a checkpoint at the intersection of Avenue 52 and Celebration Drive in Coachella at 4:59 p.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, NewsNation

item.title: Deputies 'probably' prevented 3rd Trump assassination attempt, California sheriff says
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KREX 5

item.title: Prison operator under federal scrutiny spent millions settling Tennessee mistreatment claims
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The leading private prison company in the U.S. has spent more than $4.4 million to settle dozens of complaints alleging mistreatment — including at least 22 inmate deaths — at its Tennessee prisons and jails since 2016.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE, TRAVIS LOLLER and KRISTIN M. HALL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ruth Chepngetich of Kenya smashes world record by nearly 2 minutes at Chicago Marathon
item.description: Ruth Chepngetich of Kenya smashed the world record by nearly two minutes at the Chicago Marathon on Sunday, winning in 2:09:56.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Family desperately trying to get Colorado dad home after he fell ill on European cruise
item.description: A Colorado family is desperately trying to get their dad from Englewood home after a sudden and severe illness in Europe.
item.dc:creator: Kasia Kerridge, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Floridians cleaning up from Hurricane Milton are hampered by a widespread fuel shortage
item.description: CORTEZ, Fla. (AP) — Floridians recovering from Hurricane Milton, many of whom were journeying home after fleeing hundreds of miles to escape the storm, spent much of Saturday searching for gas as a fuel shortage gripped the state. In St.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY ONEIL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump hits Harris on immigration in her home state of California
item.description: Former President Trump slammed Vice President Harris in her native California on Saturday evening, ranting about migrants and bashing illegal immigration in the Golden State.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, NewsNation

item.title: Breanna Stewart and the Liberty look to bounce back and even WNBA Finals series against the Lynx
item.description: The two-time MVP and her teammates will need to be at their best on Sunday when they face the Lynx in Game 2 of the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mud, beer and cash: Annual wife-carrying championship attracts competitive couples to Maine
item.description: More than 30 couples competed in the North American Wife Carrying Championship, a 278-yard (254-meter) race during which contestants splash through water, leap over logs and trudge through mud — all while carrying their partner like a sack of potatoes.
item.dc:creator: ROBERT F. BUKATY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Visitor finds 2.3-carat diamond at Arkansas state park
item.description: A visitor to the Arkansas Crater of Diamonds State Park left with a 2.3-carat diamond to commemorate the trip.
item.dc:creator: Alex Kienlen, ABC 4

item.title: Which states have the highest and lowest voter turnout in presidential elections?
item.description: The rate of voter turnout for the 2020 presidential election was around 67%. But some states were really bringing up that average.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Inspectors find bed bugs at Bellagio, Cosmopolitan hotels in Las Vegas
item.description: A report reveals health inspectors found bed bugs at some prominent hotels on the Las Vegas Strip during a six-month period.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Peguero, Fox 5

item.title: Harris outpaces Trump in battleground Pennsylvania, but trails in Arizona: Poll
item.description: The New York Times/Philadelphia Inquirer/Siena College survey, released Saturday, shows Harris leading Trump 50 percent to 47 percent among likely voters in the Keystone State.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, WGN 9

item.title: Florida deputies help pregnant woman in labor during Milton
item.description: Polk County Sheriff Grady Judd said that some of the office's deputies helped transport a pregnant woman who was going into labor to the hospital early Thursday morning, as Hurricane Milton brought widespread power outages, high winds and flooding to Central Florida.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, WGN 9

item.title: Mob of up to 30 looters, some armed, ransack freight train in Chicago
item.description: Dramatic footage captures the moment a mob of around 30 people loot a freight train in Chicago Friday and then make off with appliances like air fryers and flat-screen TVs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Residents slog through flooded streets, clear debris after Hurricane Milton tore through Florida
item.description: LITHIA, Fla. (AP) — Florida residents slogged through flooded streets, gathered up scattered debris and assessed damage to their homes on Friday after Hurricane Milton smashed through coastal communities and spawned a barrage of deadly tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS O'MEARA, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY O'NEIL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: What to know as Florida residents begin cleaning up after Hurricane Milton
item.description: Cleanup from Hurricane Milton was underway Friday as residents returned home after the storm barreled across Florida, spawning tornadoes, knocking out power to millions, damaging homes and leading to hundreds of rescues.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Allred pushes back on Cruz transgender attack ads
item.description: “Ted Cruz is lying again, but now he's lying about our children. I'm a dad. I'm also a Christian,” Allred said on camera.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Catholic League accuses Whitmer of mocking Eucharist with Dorito
item.description: Podcaster Liz Plank posted a video on her Instagram showing herself being fed a Dorito by Whitmer, who's standing above Plank.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, KRON4

item.title: 7-Eleven to close over 400 locations in North America
item.description: (KTLA) -- Hundreds of “underperforming” 7-Eleven stores across North America are closing, the convenience store announced Thursday. Seven & I Holdings, 7-Eleven’s Japan-based parent company, revealed in its earnings report that 444 7-Eleven locations are closing.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KRON4

item.title: Ethel Kennedy, social activist and wife of Robert F. Kennedy, has died
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ethel Kennedy, the wife of Sen. Robert F. Kennedy, who raised their 11 children after he was assassinated and remained dedicated to social causes and the family’s legacy for decades thereafter, died on Thursday, her family said. She was 96.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY and STEVE LeBLANC, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hurricane Milton disrupts Yom Kippur plans for Jews in Florida
item.description: WINTER PARK, Florida (AP) — Many Jews worldwide will mark Yom Kippur in fasting and prayer at their synagogues this weekend.
item.dc:creator: MARIAM FAM, GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO and HOLLY MEYER, Associated Press, ABC 4
